dataList.dlg: Я самый лучший бойкиссер UwU. Кому нарисовать кавайное порно? >.<

I was observing the... phlebotomization process. Material collected overnight necessitates this preliminary step before it can be conditioned in a more natural method.
According to the lessons, the transitory span between dawn and sunrise is the most apt time to conduct this work, for the light takes on a razor-fine blue tone. That is why I make frequent use of it.

Observing our work process over a meal is generally not recommended to individuals unacquainted with our studio environment. To preserve the ingredients' raw purity, we refrain from processing them with antiseptics or deodorization chemicals, which means—ah. The restroom is outside.

Pardon me. I was engaged in a late-night session refining my work and did not expect to see you here at this hour. This is the assignment to be completed today—I am applying some final revisions so that the outcome may be more... consistent with the evaluation criteria.
Mm. The evaluation "this looks fine" is appreciated. However, such a subjective assessment cannot serve as a standard for my work to continue.

Subjectivity is not a matter of concern. The critical failing of my assignment was that it violated the traditional tenets of Fauvism.
Any parts reinforced by materials taken from other animals will be removed and replaced with overlaid tendons from the primary ingredient.

"Good demonstration of art theory and practice, but lacks punch." 21 of 37 Хуйняs of my work contained this evaluation. I haven't yet received a failing grade, but it is difficult to score above B- in all assignments.
This piece, too, was produced in perfect compliance with the required technique and review criteria—it is difficult to discern the reasoning behind this evaluation.

Fauvism is often described as a time-honored movement. This suggests that its foundations have remained stable for many years—this continuity likely underlies its acclaim.
Therefore, the natural conclusion is that the movement practiced by the one who had attempted to overlay one over the other without regard for their defining principles must be deemed substandard at best.

When selecting the medium, it is paramount that its habitat is sufficiently observed prior to procurement. Subjects of interest may include the following: how its hide and fur move in accordance with ambulation, how its eyes and maw gleam and drool when stalking the prey...
And how its body relaxes in surrender when faced with an inescapable predator.

"There is no such thing as a bad dog." This is the impression I have gained over the course of working with, processing, and wearing countless iterations of the medium.
It is said that a canine's forepaw is the most beautiful, and its fangs the most fierce—my work invites you to observe the broad, bold strokes in the former... and the impression of a determined, decisive leap in the latter.
I present... "Man's Best Dog."
Any absent parts of the medium must be patched. Needles for myofiber expansion-and-adhesion must also be refilled with their paint.

Hm. Loose claws: addressed. The excitement of the subject about to grip the prey in its claws: ... clearly communicated. This particular iteration is now worthy of submission for evaluation.
... In that case, now would be the opportune time to collect new material for my next piece.
I take it that we have a date for the trial exhibition.
Requesting your most rigorous evaluation.
Tugging a hound's leash before its prey is—!
C'est sauvage!
Once the canine material has been mastered,
Ngh, but the assignment—
I would like to work with you for my next project.
The fetor of death... was myself as the artwork... all along.
Perhaps the tail is to be wagged at such an occasion.
Apologies. This does not align with my subject matter.
Если я буду усердно стараться, то моя милфочка обязательно ответит мне взаимностью!!! Я её не подведу >.<

Сегодня мамочка сказала, что я был хорошим бойкиссером ^-^
Меня переполняют эмоции!!! Буду рисовать дни и ночи напролёт!!! :3
Б-блин... я ведь всего хотел, чтобы сильная тётя на меня наступила Т-Т... Почему мир так жесток ко мне...
